headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -71.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 3% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 150 quotes and an overwhelming 129 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting loudly and consistently today.
• The frustration score of 62.2 sits in the upper third of its 165-day range, signalling well above-average negativity but not at peak levels.
• Fears dropped sharply from yesterday's 4.5 to -31.3, suggesting that topic has gone quieter, while Optimism edged up slightly from its recent low but remains deeply negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
